title: Word Counter
hero_subheading: Count words characters and sentences of your content live.

how_to_use.title: Access Word Counter
how_to_use.description: Navigate to the Word Counter page on DevToolKit. Input your raw parameters, files, or paste your target assets into the workspaces editor panel.

how_to_use.title: Configure Settings
how_to_use.description: Adjust output preferences, compression sliders, format options, or algorithms specific to the tool's settings.

how_to_use.title: Process and Save
how_to_use.description: Click the process action trigger button. The results calculate client side. Click copy or download to export the output files locally.

features.title: Free Forever
features.description: No signup or credit card required. Use Word Counter completely free of cost.

features.title: Instant Processing
features.description: High performance client-side logic processes your tasks in fractions of a second.

features.title: Fully Responsive
features.description: Optimized interface works beautifully on smartphones, tablets, laptops, and desktop computers.

features.title: Privacy Guaranteed
features.description: All calculations run safely in your local browser sandbox. Your data is never sent to any server.

features.title: Instant Copy
features.description: Easily copy results, download generated codes, or export formatted outputs with one click.

features.title: Browser execution
features.description: Zero installation needed. Access all utilities directly in your modern web browser.

faqs.question: Is Word Counter really free?
faqs.answer: Yes! Every feature of Word Counter on DevToolKit is 100% free with no hidden charges, trials, or subscriptions.

faqs.question: Do you store or look at my inputs?
faqs.answer: Never. All inputs, text, files, and outputs are handled locally inside your web client. We value privacy and store nothing on our backend.

faqs.question: Does it work on mobile phones?
faqs.answer: Yes, our user interface is designed responsively to adapt perfectly to mobile screens and browsers.

faqs.question: How accurate is the Word Counter?
faqs.answer: It is highly accurate. Calculates real-time word and character statistics instantly.

faqs.question: Are there any usage limits?
faqs.answer: No, you can run conversions, validations, or generation tasks as many times as you like. No text limit.

faqs.question: Do I need to download desktop software?
faqs.answer: No install required. Word Counter is built purely with web standards and runs live inside your browser.

faqs.question: Is there a file upload size limit?
How can I report a bug or request a feature?
faqs.answer: Feel free to use the Contact page form from the footer quick links. We check suggestions daily!
